message:
test(e2e): add CASS workflow integration tests

Add 5 CASS E2E tests covering:
- Full integration workflow
- Pattern extraction logic
- Quality analysis workflow
- Learning integration workflow
- Knowledge query workflow

Also includes fixes to WAL safety tests (use list() instead of show()
for ID verification) and adds concurrent_tests module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
